title: Digit Six
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Digit Six''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] picket [[Starship/Legends|ship]] stationed at [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. It was destroyed at the [[Battle of Bakura]] when, after being critically damaged, its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] crashed into a [[Ssi-ruu]]vi ship. All hands died.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''

[[Category:IR-3F-class light frigates]]
[[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
